【 Textured Anti-Slip Coating 】- Ingrown hair tweezers have anti-slip texture coating so that when you are tweezing in fine details, you don't need to worry about slipping of tweezers which may cause injury otherwise

【 Premium Stainless Steel tips 】- Facial hair tweezer have perfectly hand filed tips that easily catch & pull out hair from your eyebrows without cutting, be it thick hair without getting hurt your sensitive skin

【 Pluck Every Tiny Pesky Hair 】- Use our Precision tweezers to remove every tiny stubborn ingrown hair, splinters, grey hair, short bristles from nose ears chin with ease & comfort and enjoy stress free beauty routines
description: Product Description FLAWLESS GROOMING, EVERY TIME TRUSTED AND CHOSEN BY PROFESSIONALS WORLDWIDE NARZ tweezers quality is trusted by experts & loved by customers. Our products are trusted & chosen by professionals & everyday users who value performance, durability & perfection. From design to delivery, every detail reflects our years of commitment & research in product development. EYEBROW TWEEZER YOU CAN TRUST PRECISION BEYOND ACCURACY INTRODUCING NARZ PRECISION TWEEZERS— The essential grooming tool crafted from durable & lightweight stainless steel. Our tweezers ensure longevity and comfort. Either you need versatile slanted tweezers for daily shaping or sharp pointed tweezers for tackling any ingrown hair, NARZ Tweezers will deliver a flawless accuracy. Our Tweezers for facial hair women & men are designed for everyone. Upgrade to NARZ for a superior ergonomic tweezing experience. PRECISION GUARANTEED 100%. SUPERIOR CRAFTSMANSHIP GUARANTEED #1 TWEEZER – PRECISION THAT DEFINES PERFECTION MEET THE #1 TWEEZER — Reliability 100%. NARZ tweezers are the only choice designed for perfection, these tweezers combine superior engineering, premium materials and effortless performance that gives you a salon-quality results in seconds. Previous page Sharp, ANGLED-TIP Tweezers designed for clean, Precise plucking with maximum control and comfort SLANT TIPS TWEEZERS Ensure accurate grip for effortless eyebrow shaping and targeted plucking. STRAIGHT TIP offer firm, precise grip for removing fine hairs and detailed eyebrow tweezing work. POINTED TIPS Target ultra-fine hairs with precision, ideal for detailed brow and splinter removal Next page 1 ANGLED TWEEZER 2 SLANT EYEBROW TWEEZER 3 CLASSIC STRAIGHT TWEEZER 4 POINTED TWEEZERS HOW TO USE NARZ EYEBROW TWEEZERS Preparation & Sanitization Hold the tweezers by the handle & wipe the tips to sanitise them to prevent any skin irritation before you start shaping your brows. Eyebrow Mapping & Shaping Before plucking, use a straight edge to map brows: align it with your nose and inner eye to find start then mark arch and the end with light pencil. Tweezing Use your non-dominant hand to pull skin taut, grip a hair close to root with tweezers then pull quickly in the direction of growth to reduce pain. Soothing & Aftercare Once your brows are shaped, gently apply aloe vera gel or a mild moisturiser to reduce redness, soothe skin & calm hair follicles. What makes NARZ tweezers different from other regular ones in the Market? NARZ tweezers are crafted from high-quality stainless steel with precision tips—slant, straight, angled & pointed options ensure maximum control, effortless plucking, and long-lasting durability, giving you professional-grade results at home. How do I use the tweezers safely on sensitive skin? Simple! Always clean the tweezers before use, pull the skin taut with your non-dominant hand, and grasp hairs close to the root. Pull slowly in the direction of hair growth to minimize discomfort and Use moisturiser to reduce any skin redness. Can these tweezers be used for eyebrow shaping and other fine hair removal? Yes! Slant tips are perfect for shaping brows, straight tips for general fine hairs, and pointed tips for precision removal. They are designed to handle even the tiniest hairs for clean, salon-quality grooming at home. Are these tweezers suitable for beginners? Absolutely! Ergonomic handles and precision tips make them easy to use for both beginners and professionals. Follow basic instructions for mapping, cleaning, and plucking to achieve precise, effortless results every time. How should I clean and store my tweezers? Wipe the tips with rubbing alcohol or any safe cleaner before and after use. Store in a dry case or pouch to protect the tips, maintain sharpness, and prevent rust. Proper care ensures safety and prolongs the lifespan of your tweezers.
